title: thelypteris santae-catharinae
intro: Thelypteris santae-catharinae, also known as the Santa Catharina fern, is a species of fern native to the Atlantic Forest of southeastern Brazil. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris santae-catharinae include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant's leaves and rhizomes are used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and poultices, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
